title: cyclophorus gralla
intro: Cyclophorus gralla, also known as the Chinese Cyclophorus or snake gourd, is a species of plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclophorus gralla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Cyclophorus gralla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
